architecture.summary: The paper presents Gemma Scope, a collection of sparse autoencoders (SAEs) trained on Gemma 2 language models at multiple layers and scales. SAEs are applied across the residual stream to decompose model activations into sparse, interpretable features. Information flows from frozen Gemma 2 activations through trained SAE encoders to produce sparse latent codes, which are decoded back to approximate the original activation space for analysis and interpretation.

biblio.title: Gemma Scope: Open Sparse Autoencoders Everywhere All At Once on Gemma 2

claims.statement: Open sparse autoencoders are trained on Gemma 2 at multiple layers and scales to decompose model activations into sparse, interpretable features
